name: hollywood-movie-quiz
title: How well do you know Hollywood movies?
intro: Look at the visual clue, read the short description, and choose the movie. Each question is shown as its own slide.

result_messages.title: Opening-weekend rookie
result_messages.text: You caught a few famous clues, but the classics still have plot twists waiting for you.

result_messages.title: Popcorn regular
result_messages.text: You know the big moments and can hold your own in a movie-night debate.

result_messages.title: Premiere guest
result_messages.text: Strong cinema memory. Posters, quotes, and plot clues are clearly your territory.

result_messages.title: Hollywood archivist
result_messages.text: You read visual clues like end credits. This is full red-carpet energy.

questions.text: A former pilot leaves Earth through a wormhole to search for humanity's next home.
questions.explanation: Interstellar follows Cooper and a space mission through a wormhole near Saturn.

questions.text: A quiet beach town faces panic after a great white shark changes the summer forever.
questions.explanation: Jaws made a shark fin, a beach, and a few notes of music instantly recognizable.

questions.text: A hacker is offered a choice that reveals the world is not what it seems.
questions.explanation: The red pill and blue pill choice is one of the defining images from The Matrix.

questions.text: Scientists bring prehistoric creatures back to life in a theme park where control quickly collapses.
questions.explanation: Jurassic Park turns a dinosaur theme park into a survival story.

questions.text: A gentle storyteller crosses decades of American history with a suitcase, a bench, and a floating feather.
questions.explanation: Forrest Gump opens with a feather and returns to the bench as a storytelling frame.
